_comment: Anti-cavalry square demo: a lone player Infantry unit (facing down) is charged in the REAR by two cavalry that spawn behind it (above; team 1 advances downward onto it). Early on the player selects the infantry and presses O to jump straight to Square (the direct anti-cav reaction, no cycling through Tight/Loose). In Square the unit presents spears/shields on every side: the rear charge finds no weak facing (no flank/rear bonus) and is braced from behind, so the ring holds instead of shattering. Camera frames the clash. Deterministic (scenario + seed + scripted input).
